senses.gloss: active participle of قَالَ (qāla, “to say”) sayer, one who said something
active participle of قَالَ (qāla, “to nap”) napper

examples.text: وَكَمْ مِنْ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَاهَا فَجَاءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيَاتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَائِلُونَ

etymology.text:
Derived from the active participle of قَالَ (qāla, “to say”).

Derived from the active participle of قَالَ (qāla, “to nap”).
